name: Vendor security questionnaire on onboarding
description: All new third parties complete a tiered security questionnaire before contract signature.

name: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
description: Restricted data handled by vendors must be encrypted with approved algorithms.

name: Quarterly third-party access reviews
description: Access granted to vendors is reviewed and recertified every quarter.

name: Vendor business continuity & DR validation
description: Critical vendors must evidence tested BCP/DR plans annually.

name: Sub-processor change notification clause
description: Contracts require 30-day prior notice for any sub-processor changes.

name: Annual SOC 2 / ISO report collection
description: Independent assurance reports are collected and reviewed annually for critical vendors.
